articles.title: Game Developers "Found Out At the Same Time as the Public" About NVIDIA DLSS 5 - TechPowerUp
articles.description: Much has been said about NVIDIA's recent DLSS 5 announcement, with many criticisms of the tech stemming from how the neural rendering potentially alters the artistic vision and tone of the game. While NVIDIA insists that developers remain in full control, and…
articles.content: cinemawareGamers "Audience Capture" Nexus smoothly goes with the baying pitchorks mob's opinion? Colour me unsurprised :)No, sir, the best take on this today comes from an actual veteran artist, not … [+3469 chars]
